premise: A blonde creator teases a Yor Forger cosplay, then pays it off with a full black-dress reveal in the same bedroom setting.

cast.description: One blonde adult woman carries both the teaser and the reveal. The anime insert is reference content, not a second live-action character.

continuity_rules: The same blonde creator must carry scene_001 and scene_002 with matching facial identity and body proportions.
The bedroom layout stays consistent across both scenes: anime shelf on the left, neutral wall, and door hardware on the right.
Scene_001 rebuilds the question caption as editable Shotstack text and keeps the Yor anime reference card as a separate overlay layer in canonical packaging.
Platform watermark and username UI are ignored by default in remake media.

supporting_character_policy.rationale: The upper-right Yor insert is a reference card, not a live-action supporting cast member.

scene_arc.beat: Tease the Yor Forger cosplay idea before the transformation lands.
Reveal the finished black Yor-inspired look with the same creator and room continuity.
